prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built **Lancia Dino 2.4L V6 (engine code: 192B.000**) with forged internals (JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression, Carrillo H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (1.06 A/R turbine housing) and **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** for 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) boost, targeting 450+ HP at 7,800 RPM on **VP Racing Q16 fuel** with a **Bosch Motorsport 0280158802 high-flow fuel pump** and **Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors**.

Custom **Tubi Style 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system** with **Akrapovič 4-2-1 headers** (equal-length, 1.75-inch primaries) and a **GESI 304 stainless steel muffler** (straight-through design, 2.5-inch outlet) to optimize scavenging for the 12-valve SOHC V6 while maintaining FIA Group 4 homologation compliance.

Full **Ohlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers** (24-click rebound, 22-click compression, adjustable ride height via threaded perches) with **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm springs** (front) and **1200N/mm springs** (rear), paired with **Whiteline adjustable anti-roll bars** (24mm front, 22mm rear) and **Polyurethane bushings (SuperPro SPF0116K)** for chassis rigidity, tuned for the Stratos HF Zero’s 2,180mm wheelbase and 54/46 weight distribution.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 Stratos HF Zero widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with **custom 3D-printed ABS side skirts** (integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling) and a **custom aluminum rear wing** (dual-element, 1,200mm span, adjustable angle via **AeroCatch DZUS fasteners**) to generate 180kg of downforce at 160 km/h (100 mph).

Bespoke **BBS RS-GT II 16x9.5 (front) and 16x11 (rear) wheels** (ET15 front, ET5 rear) wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (245/40 R16 front, 295/35 R16 rear)** with **AP Racing CP8660 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers** (355mm front rotors, 330mm rear) and **Ferodo DS3.1 brake pads** for endurance racing.

Custom **carbon fiber monocoque interior** (replacing the original fiberglass) with **Sparco Pro 2000 seats** (carbon-Kevlar shell, FIA 8862-2009 certified), **Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM2)**, and a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm diameter, suede grip) paired with a **NRG Innovations quick-release hub**. The dashboard features a **Motec C127 digital dash** (integrated with the **LINK G4+ Xtreme ECU**) and **custom aluminum switchgear** (replicating the original HF Zero layout but with modern tactile feedback).
